title: Set Time Zone for Due Date Notifications
excerpt: It would be great to be able to set the time zone when creating due date reminders in “deadline mode.” We work with clients globally and being able to assign the reminder based on a user’s time zone would be very helpful…

posts.author: erusso (Elizabeth R.)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to be able to set the time zone when creating due date reminders in “deadline mode.” We work with clients globally and being able to assign the reminder based on a user’s time zone would be very helpful.

For example, I set the reminder for 9AM before the timeline arrives to notify People (column). My client who is assigned an item lives in Dubai and they will get notified at 6PM GST instead of 9AM their time because I created the automation so it takes my time zone (Eastern).
